privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated continuous spatial time-series data simulating mouse movements. A Python script explicitly constructs 20 valid participant profiles with 20 trials each, utilizing random parabolic bowing and Gaussian noise to differentiate 'Competitor' and 'Unrelated' conditions. Participant 'p99' is explicitly injected as a robotic artifact with perfectly linear trajectories (MD near 0). The expected ground truth group mean attraction effect, generated with random.seed(42), is exactly 120.962. There are no metadata claims to verify because task.json is malformed and completely truncated before any metadata field.
